title: Blue Fire
description: A Blue Fire Overlay , For Clean SMP Based Combat
body:
# Blue Fire Texture Pack

Transform your game’s atmosphere with the **Blue Fire Texture Pack**, a sleek and modern visual overhaul that replaces standard fire with a vibrant blue flame. Perfect for adding a mystical or futuristic touch to your builds, this pack enhances the game’s visuals while maintaining optimal performance.

## 🔥 Features
- Stunning **blue flame textures** that stand out in any environment.
- Smooth and dynamic **fire animations** for an immersive experience.
- Lightweight and **performance-friendly** design.
- Fully compatible with the latest game versions and mod loaders.

Upgrade your world with this visually striking and optimized texture pack, making your gameplay feel more unique and alive!
